title: 我以前是/有
prompt_en: Practice talking about past states with was/were and had.
prompt_zh: 练习用was/were/had描述过去的状态和拥有。
description: 掌握was/were的肯定否定疑问和have→had过去式。
knowledge_points: 过去时 was were had 状态 过去
teaching_markdown:
## was / were 过去状态
- I was a student before. (我以前是学生)
- They were classmates. (他们以前是同学)

## had 过去拥有
- I had a dog when I was young. (我小时候有只狗)
- She had long hair last year. (她去年是长发)

## used to 过去习惯
- I used to live in Shanghai. (我曾经住在上海)
- He used to be very shy. (他以前很害羞)

## 时间标志词
- when I was young / in the past / back then / those days
- before / once / at that time

title: 昨天在哪里
prompt_en: Practice asking and answering about past locations and feelings.
prompt_zh: 练习询问和回答过去的位置和感受。
description: 掌握Where were you? / Were you...? 过去疑问句。
knowledge_points: 过去 位置 感受 疑问 回答
teaching_markdown:
## Where were you? 问过去的所在
- Where were you yesterday? — I was at home.
- Were you at school? — No, I was at work.

## 位置表达
| 在家 | 在工作 | 在学校 | 在外面 | 在里面 |
|------|--------|--------|--------|--------|
| at home | at work | at school | outside | inside |

## 状态表达
- was absent (缺席了) / was present (在场)
- was alone (独自) / was missing (不见了)
- was lost (迷路了) / was somewhere (在某处)

title: 昨天做了什么
prompt_en: Practice describing past actions with regular -ed verbs.
prompt_zh: 练习用规则动词过去式描述过去的动作。
description: 掌握规则动词加ed的读音和拼写。
knowledge_points: 过去时 ed 发音 规则动词
teaching_markdown:
## 规则动词过去式 (-ed)
动词原形 + ed → 过去式

## 三种发音
- /t/：walked, talked, finished (清辅音后)
- /d/：played, cleaned, arrived (浊辅音后)
- /ɪd/：visited, needed, wanted (t/d后)

## 常用规则动词
- visit → visited (拜访)
- arrive → arrived (到达)
- move → moved (搬家/移动)
- show → showed (展示)
- check → checked (检查)
- seem → seemed (似乎)

title: 不规则动词
prompt_en: Practice 30 common irregular past tense verbs.
prompt_zh: 练习30个核心不规则动词过去式。
knowledge_points: 不规则动词 过去式 核心动词
teaching_markdown:
## 高频不规则动词 (30个核心)
| 原形 | 过去式 | 含义 |
|------|--------|------|
| go | went | 去 |
| see | saw | 看见 |
| say | said | 说 |
| get | got | 得到 |
| make | made | 制作 |
| give | gave | 给 |
| take | took | 拿 |
| buy | bought | 买 |
| think | thought | 想 |
| feel | felt | 感觉 |
| find | found | 找到 |
| tell | told | 告诉 |

## 学习技巧
- 不规则动词需要逐个记忆，没有统一规则
- 常用就会记住，不要死记硬背
- 每天练3-5个，日积月累

title: 上个周末/去年
prompt_en: Practice telling stories about last weekend and last year.
prompt_zh: 练习讲述上周末和去年的经历。
description: 掌握用过去时叙述完整经历的能力。
knowledge_points: 叙事 过去时 经历 时间表达
teaching_markdown:
## 用过去时叙述经历
- Last weekend, I went to a party. (上周末我去了派对)
- Last year, I visited Beijing. (去年我去了北京)

## 叙述要素
- 时间：last weekend / last month / last year / yesterday / ago
- 地点：at the park / at a restaurant / at home
- 事件：went / saw / ate / met / bought / visited
- 感受：It was fun / I felt happy / It was amazing

## 连接词
- First / Then / After that / Finally
- and / but / because / so

title: 否定和疑问
prompt_en: Practice past tense negatives and questions with didn't and Did.
prompt_zh: 练习过去时的否定句和疑问句。
description: 掌握didn't和Did的用法，以及Wh-过去疑问句。
knowledge_points: 否定 疑问 didn't Did 过去疑问
teaching_markdown:
## 过去否定句
- I didn't + 动词原形：I didn't go. (我没去)
- ❌ I didn't went. → ✅ I didn't go. (didn't后用原形)

## 过去疑问句
- Did + 主语 + 动词原形？
- Did you go? — Yes, I did. / No, I didn't.
- What did you do? (Wh- + did + 主语 + 动词原形)

## 关键规则
- 否定和疑问中，did/didn't 已表过去，动词用原形
- 回答：Yes, I did. 不重复整句

## 实用表达
- Actually, I didn't... (其实我没...)
- Neither did I. (我也没)
- I wonder what happened. (我想知道发生了什么)
